complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Add flutter_markdown dependency and basic setup
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: No expansion needed - straightforward dependency addition and basic widget test.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Simple pubspec.yaml update, flutter pub get, and basic MarkdownBody test widget. Minimal risk, standard Flutter package integration with clear test strategy. No architectural changes or complex logic.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1. Create custom MarkdownStyleSheet matching app typography. 2. Replace Text widget with MarkdownBody Column in ArticleDetailsView. 3. Add GitHub Flavored Markdown extension support.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Involves UI refactoring, custom styling with MarkdownStyleSheet, extension sets, and typography matching. Requires widget tests and golden tests. Moderate complexity due to styling precision and dependency on task 39.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Add markdown helper text to UploadArticleView content field
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: No expansion needed - simple Text.rich addition.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Purely cosmetic UI addition of helper text with basic styling. Single widget test. No logic, state management, or integration concerns.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement full-screen loading overlay for ArticleUploadLoading state
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1. Create full-screen Stack overlay with Positioned.fill and IgnorePointer. 2. Implement BlocBuilder state detection for ArticleUploadLoading. 3. Add back button interception with WillPopScope. 4. Style loading UI matching app theme.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Involves Stack positioning, interaction blocking (IgnorePointer), navigation interception (WillPopScope), and BlocBuilder integration. Moderate complexity due to overlay layering and gesture handling. Comprehensive test requirements.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Add SnackBar success feedback on publish completion
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1. Implement BlocListener for ArticleUploadSuccess state. 2. Create SnackBar with View action navigation. 3. Add error SnackBar clearing logic.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Standard BlocListener + ScaffoldMessenger pattern with navigation action. Simple but requires proper state handling and dependency on loading overlay (42). Integration test needed.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Handle Navigator.pop result in home screen for success feedback
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1. Update FAB onPressed to await Navigator result. 2. Implement conditional SnackBar + cubit refresh on true result. 3. Test null/false result handling.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Involves Navigator result handling, conditional UI feedback, and cubit refresh coordination. Requires careful result propagation from upload flow. Dependencies chain adds coordination complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1. Wrap thumbnail preview with InkWell/GestureDetector calling _pickImage. 2. Add 'Tap to change' hint text. 3. Implement performance optimizations (cacheWidth/Height). 4. Add accessibility semantics.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Gesture handling on existing preview, reuse of ImagePicker logic, performance considerations (cache sizing), and accessibility. Moderate complexity due to image handling and UI state coordination.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: No expansion needed - simple text change.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Trivial string replacement in button widget. Single widget test verification. No functional changes.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Add error handling and overlay cleanup
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1. Implement BlocListener for ArticleUploadFailure state handling. 2. Add overlay dismissal and form state preservation logic. 3. Implement upload timeout (30s). 4. Test network failure scenarios.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Complex state management across loading/failure transitions, overlay lifecycle, timeout implementation, and error preservation. Multiple dependencies (42,43) increase integration risk. Comprehensive integration testing required.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1. Add Semantics labels to loading overlay, SnackBar, markdown components. 2. Align all TextStyles to app typography (Butler fonts). 3. Test with TalkBack/VoiceOver screen readers. 4. Apply Material Design spacing consistently.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Cross-cutting concern spanning multiple components (40,42,43,45). Requires accessibility testing tools, screen reader verification, and theme consistency. Multiple dependencies increase scope and testing burden.
